'''KonGar Ship Works''' was the manufacturer of the [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]]. The company also produced [[Starship/Legends|starship]] components, such as the [[KGDefender ion engine|KGDefender]] [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]] mounted on [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar's]] [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']].

{{Company-stub}}
